query: SELECT bt.block_id FROM block_tags bt JOIN blocks b ON b.id = bt.block_id WHERE bt.tag_id = ?1 AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.is_conflict = 0 UNION SELECT btr.source_id AS block_id FROM block_tag_refs btr JOIN blocks b ON b.id = btr.source_id WHERE btr.tag_id = ?1 AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.is_conflict = 0
